queue.task: HenryDB: Secondary indexes — CREATE INDEX, DROP INDEX, automatic index selection in query planner
queue.summary: Secondary indexes: CREATE INDEX, CREATE UNIQUE INDEX, DROP INDEX. Non-unique B+ tree for duplicates. Index scan in query planner with AND residual. 24 new tests → 150 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: GROUP BY clause with aggregate functions, HAVING support
queue.summary: GROUP BY with aggregates (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX), HAVING filter, multi-column grouping. 15 new tests → 165 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: Subqueries — scalar subqueries in WHERE, EXISTS, IN (SELECT ...)
queue.summary: Subqueries: IN (SELECT), NOT IN, IN (list), EXISTS, NOT EXISTS, scalar subqueries in comparisons. 15 new tests → 180 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: ALTER TABLE (ADD COLUMN, DROP COLUMN), column defaults
queue.summary: ALTER TABLE: ADD/DROP/RENAME COLUMN, RENAME TABLE, column defaults, index rebuild on schema change. 21 new tests → 201 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: Crash recovery stress test — simulate crash mid-transaction, verify WAL replay
queue.summary: Crash recovery stress tests: WAL integrity, uncommitted detection, rollback correctness, 20-tx interleaved stress, MVCC visibility. 22 new tests → 223 total.

queue.summary: String functions: LIKE pattern matching, UPPER, LOWER, LENGTH, CONCAT, || operator, BETWEEN. 21 new tests → 244 total.
